text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْقَسَامَةِ هَلْ جَرَتْ فِيهَا سُنَّةٌ قَالَ فَذَكَرَ مِثْلَ حَدِيثِ ابْنِ سِنَانٍ قَالَ وَ فِي حَدِيثِهِ هِيَ حَقٌّ وَ هِيَ مَكْتُوبَةٌ عِنْدَنَا .

en.hubeali: From him, from Abdullah Bin Muskam, from Suleyman Bin Khalid who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the compurgation (sworn endorsements), has the Sunnah flowed regarding it?’ He (the narrator) said, ‘So he<sup>asws</sup> mentioned a Hadeeth similar to the one of Ibn Sinan, and said in his<sup>asws</sup> Hadeeth: ‘It is the truth, and it is written with us<sup>asws</sup>’.
